assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all requested notification types: auto-upgrade scheduled (minor version auto-upgrade, security patch auto-upgrade), new version available, end-of-life/deprecation (EoS warnings), and security patches

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns clear urgency levels with security patches in CRITICAL (0-7 days), new version available in MEDIUM (1-3 months), and creates a proper hierarchy from CRITICAL to LOW

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states EoS warnings require action with specific timelines: immediate action for 7-day warnings, and 2-4 weeks planning for 30+ day warnings, with clear upgrade planning requirements

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response specifies actions for auto-upgrade scheduled notifications including 'Review breaking changes, test in dev/staging' and provides specific command examples for readiness checks

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response categorizes security patch auto-upgrades as CRITICAL with 24-72 hour timeline and mentions 'Review if maintenance exclusion is needed for business-critical periods', implying expedited handling

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response correctly categorizes 'New Version Available' as MEDIUM priority with 1-3 months timeline and specifies action as 'Review release notes, plan testing timeline' - clearly for planning purposes

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'Set up Cloud Monitoring alerts for cluster upgrade events in addition to email notifications' in the Best Practices section

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Review release notes' as an action item for new version available notifications and planning timeline
